use.style: fill: none; stroke-width: 20; stroke: rgb(252, 255, 255); stroke-opacity: 1;

fill: none; stroke-width: 10; stroke: none; stroke-opacity: 1;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-width: 10; stroke: rgb(252, 255, 255); stroke-opacity: 1;
